pillars.title: Sovereign Infrastructure
pillars.summary: Protocol-controlled compute, storage, and networking fabric with verifiable uptime and deterministic provisioning.

pillars.title: Platform Engineering
pillars.summary: Reusable service building blocks with standardized APIs, release grading, and cross-ministry composition.

pillars.title: Operational Resilience
pillars.summary: Runbooks, chaos testing, upgrade pipelines, and incident attestations under Protocol v3.0 incident taxonomy.

pillars.title: Emerging Technology Stewardship
pillars.summary: Gated evaluation, sandbox release, and readiness gates for quantum, biotechnology, and autonomous system capabilities.

pillars.title: Developer Experience
pillars.summary: SDKs, documentation, onboarding pipelines, and credentialing for internal and citizen contributors.

mission: Deliver sovereign digital infrastructure, operational excellence, and emerging-technology readiness across all ministries under the Secretary of Technology, Science & Innovation. Every service is release-graded, incident-attested, and designed for Protocol v3.0 interoperability.

operations.title: Protocol Node Fleet
operations.summary: Consensus-class node infrastructure with deterministic running costs, automated rotation, and audit logs.

operations.title: Artifact Registry
operations.summary: Signed container and model registry with provenance chains, vulnerability scanning, and governed promotion.

operations.title: Incident Attestation System
operations.summary: Protocol-aligned incident taxonomy, root-cause reporting, and post-incident review tracking.

operations.title: Identity Credential Broker
operations.summary: Verifiable credential issuance, selective disclosure, and revocation with sovereign key ceremonies.

operations.title: Workflow Orchestration
operations.summary: Deterministic workflow runtime with approval gates, timeout handling, and state persistence.

infrastructure.title: Sovereign Compute Mesh
infrastructure.summary: Multi-zone compute mesh with heterogeneous workloads, scheduler quotas, and capacity attestations.

infrastructure.title: Log Archive Service
infrastructure.summary: Immutable log storage with indexed search, retention policies, and sovereign integrity verification.

infrastructure.title: Edge Gateway Network
infrastructure.summary: Citizen-facing edge gateways with DDoS mitigation, rate limiting, and protocol upgrade orchestration.

infrastructure.title: Model Training Cluster
infrastructure.summary: Protocol-grade training cluster for internal and approved research models with energy-aware scheduling.

emerging.title: Quantum Sandbox
emerging.summary: Gated quantum-literate environment with benchmark workloads, noise models, and readiness review.

emerging.title: Autonomous Drone Inspection
emerging.summary: BVLOS-capable inspection drones with sovereign telemetry, collision-avoidance voting, and incident logging.

emerging.title: Synthetic Data Studio
emerging.summary: Privacy-preserving synthetic-data generation with provenance tags, bias auditing, and release-graded outputs.

emerging.title: Biotech Compute Gateway
emerging.summary: Isolated compute gateway for approved bioinformatics workflows with encryption-at-rest and ethics review.
